lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jeea praan adhaar |
lines.english: are all in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Support of the soul and the breath of life.
Sit in peace, O Saints, with the family of friends.
I have obtained the true wealth of the Lord's Love.
I have crossed over the treacherous world-ocean in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||3||
He alone obtains it, unto whom the Guru has bestowed it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਓ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan khattio jaa kaa naeh sumaar |
lines.english: Earn the wealth of the Lord, which is beyond estimation.
O Nanak, no one shall go away empty-handed. ||4||27||96||
The hands are sanctified instantly,
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
and the entanglements of Maya are dispelled.
Repeat constantly with your tongue the Glorious Praises of the Lord,
and you shall find peace, O my friends, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||
With pen and ink, write upon your paper
By this act, your sins shall be washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam har amrit baanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: the Name of the Lord, the Ambrosial Word of the Lord's Bani. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੇ ਦੂਤ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: dharam raae ke doot na johai |
lines.english: The couriers of the Righteous Judge of Dharma shall not touch you.
The intoxication of Maya shall not entice you at all. ||2||
Remembering the Lord in meditation, you shall not be punished by the Messenger of Death.
if you chant the Name of the One and Only Lord.
You shall be redeemed, and through you, the whole world shall be saved,
Practice this yourself, and teach others;
instill the Lord's Name in your heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har har gun gaau |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har.
that person meditates on God.
That person, who has this treasure upon his forehead

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੪॥੨੮॥੯੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak hau tis bal jaau |4|28|97|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||4||28||97||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree guaareree mahalaa 5 chaupade dupade |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Dho-Padhay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Tell me, how can he meet the Lord of the World?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਜਿ ਛੋਡਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਰਚਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo taj chhoddan tis siau man rachanaa |1|
lines.english: That which he must abandon - to that, his mind is attracted. ||1||
That which belongs to another - he claims as his own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਹੋਵਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਰਾਤੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sat hovan man lagai na raatee |2|
lines.english: That which is true - his mind is not attached to that at all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬਿਬਰਜਤ ਤਿਸ ਸਿਉ ਨੇਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo bibarajat tis siau neh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That which is forbidden - with that, he is in love. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੁ ਬਾਤ ਸਾ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jhootth baat saa sach kar jaatee |
lines.english: That which is false - he deems as true.
He takes the crooked path of the unrighteous way;
leaving the straight and narrow path, he weaves his way backwards. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹਾ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: duhaa siriaa kaa khasam prabh soee |
lines.english: God is the Lord and Master of both worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥੨੯॥੯੮॥
lines.translit: jis mele naanak so mukataa hoee |4|29|98|
lines.english: He, whom the Lord unites with Himself, O Nanak, is liberated. ||4||29||98||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
As long as the Lord commands, they enjoy their pleasures. ||1||
By burning oneself, the Beloved Lord is not obtained.
In the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, they come together through destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤਿ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਸਤੀ ਉਠਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kirat sanjog satee utth hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only by the actions of destiny does she rise up and burn herself, as a 'satee'. ||1||Pause||
Imitating what she sees, with her stubborn mind-set, she goes into the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨਿ ਭਵਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pria sang na paavai bahu jon bhavaaeeai |2|
lines.english: She does not obtain the Company of her Beloved Lord, and she wanders through countless incarnations. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਰੀ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਜਮਾਨੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis naaree kau dukh na jamaanai |3|
lines.english: that woman shall not suffer pain at the hands of the Messenger of Death. ||3||
With pure conduct and self-restraint, she surrenders to her Husband Lord's Will;
is the blessed 'satee'; she is received with honor in the Court of the Lord. ||4||30||99||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jin priau paramesar kar jaaniaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, she who looks upon the Transcendent Lord as her Husband,
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavah sehaj subhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, with natural, intuitive ease. ||1||Pause||
I am prosperous and fortunate, for I have received the True Name.
